narrative:
Pickaway County has 38,125 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.8 percentage points. Millennials are the largest generational cohort at 27.0% of registrants.
